title: machaeranthera aurea
intro: Machaeranthera aurea, also known as the Golden Rock Daisy, is a perennial plant in the daisy family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Machaeranthera aurea have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
